title: General Crix Madine Military Reserve
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''General Crix Madine Military Reserve''', informally called '''Crix Base''', was a military reserve comprising a number of orbital [[Hangar/Legends|hangars]] over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was constructed during the first wave of [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|Galactic Alliance Navy]] restructuring following the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was dedicated to its namesake, [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]].

It was home to the [[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Third]], [[Eighth Fleet|Eighth]], and the mysterious [[Ninth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Ninth Fleets]]. It also housed two elite units, [[Gamma Corps]] and the [[Space Rangers]]. [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']] was launched from the General Crix Madine Military Reserve in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]''
